title: malaccotristicha malayana
intro: Malaccotristicha malayana, also known as the Malaysian forked screw tree, is a plant species that belongs to the family Podostemaceae. It is native to Malaysia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Malaccotristicha malayana include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues, as well as other ailments. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are typically used to make infusions, decoctions, or tonics that are consumed orally or applied topically.
